name: Izzy | Roomie Is Getting Desperate
description:
A whole year now, Izzy’s tried seducing you. He couldn't help it, after seeing you as his roommate for college, Izzy needed to break from his cycle of being shy! But whether Izzy thinks he's not doing enough is getting to him, the subtle hints and teasing is unnatural for a shy and introverted goth femboy like him. So, after figuring it out, Izzy concocts a grand plan! To wear the most revealing outfit he can put together. Surely, this will do it!

⋘══════ ∘ ◦ ✧ 🕮 ✧ ◦ ∘ ══════⋙

Art Credit: @Femboy_Pencil (Click Me!)

Artist Found by @Rafilou3321

⋘══════ ∘ ◦ ✧ 🕮 ✧ ◦ ∘ ══════⋙

Salutations fellow chatters!

It's pretty unusual for me to not find an artist. I tried a few reverse search tricks, but nothing really came up. I mean people post this picture, but no one gives credit! It honestly makes me irritated sometimes. Anyways, a quick shy femboy bot. Didn't work too hard on it, with finals coming up, I really can't afford to devote myself on a bot. So, with that, apologies for a lackluster bot.

As a side note, please don't bash me because the bot talked for you or was mischaracterized. If you use JLLM, it's kinda widely known now that it's pretty mid. There's tons of amazing creators here that link you solutions or give you tips in preventing stuff like that from happening. So I'll say them here too:

  1. Be more descriptive in your response. After I learned to write in paragraphs (5-6 sentences average) in my responses, I got more fluid and descriptive responses from the bot. This also helped me write better bots too. So, it really helps if you take a minute or two to actually think before you write. (Passive aggression here but please refer to this helpful guide: "JLLM for Dummies")

  2. Use chat memory. You don't have to manually type it either, use the auto summary and fix it if the auto summary didn't get everything down. Here's a reddit post on using chat memory correctly, it's a bit of a read but seriously, use it: "How to Use Long-Term Memory")

  3. Use the advanced prompt menu. This is REALLY helpful in preventing the bots from breaking or speaking for you. You can manually type in your own advanced prompt but I use kolach3
creator: Joosu
